content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 4, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 4, 2026, focused on expanding the plugin ecosystem through new pull requests and ongoing community discussions regarding cryptographic identity and agent trust frameworks.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Plugin Integration**
    *   Initiated the integration of the TrustLayer plugin to the registry. [#332](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/332)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#332](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/332): Add @trustlayer/plugin-elizaos. Status: Open.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6688](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6688) Plugin Proposal: AgentID — Cryptographic Identity & Trust Layer for ElizaOS Agents**
    *   Community members are actively debating the implementation of trust frameworks, comparing the proposed AgentID system with existing solutions like SINT Protocol’s Avatar Layer and MAXIA.
    *   Technical discussion centers on behavioral fingerprinting metrics, specifically comparing AgentID’s L0-L4 trust tiers against SINT’s continuous CSML (Composite Safety-Model Latency) scoring.
    *   Participants are exploring the potential for aligning evidence schemas to ensure interoperability between different agent trust and identity systems.
